name: autonomi-domain-knowledge

skills.description: QBO API, chart of accounts, COGS batch costing, webhooks, auth, financial reporting

skills.name: Microsoft 365 Integration

skills.name: Google Workspace Integration
skills.description: Gmail, Drive, Sheets, Docs, Calendar via gws CLI

autonomi-dashboard.description: Platform-specific skills for the Autonomi Operations Dashboard (LynZ voice agent)
